scripts.build: if [ "$_OPENNEXT" = '1' ]; then next build; else _OPENNEXT=1 npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build; fi
scripts.build:cf: _OPENNEXT=1 npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && sed -i.bak 's/^import \* as process from .node:process./import process from "node:process";/' .open-next/middleware/handler.mjs && rm -f .open-next/middleware/handler.mjs.bak && sort -u .open-next/cloudflare/next-env.mjs > .open-next/cloudflare/next-env.mjs.tmp && mv .open-next/cloudflare/next-env.mjs.tmp .open-next/cloudflare/next-env.mjs
